style_prompt:
STYLE REQUIREMENTS (apply to every icon):
- Semi-realistic with a slight cartoon/game aesthetic — think mobile game achievement badge art
- Rich color, slight 3D depth and shading, clean transparent background
- Centered in frame with consistent padding on all sides (roughly 15% padding from each edge)
- No text of any kind in the image
- Square format, 400x400 pixels
- Consistent lighting: soft top-left light source across all icons
- Consistent level of detail: detailed enough to be recognizable at 80x80px but not cluttered
- Same color saturation and contrast level across all icons
- Transparent background (PNG with alpha channel)

chaos_archetypes.name: The Ostrich

chaos_archetypes.name: The Opening Kickoff
chaos_archetypes.icon_description: a full body stylized armored kicker figure at the exact moment after making contact, right leg fully extended upward in a high follow-through while the left arm swings forward for balance and the left leg is the plant foot firmly on the ground, opposite arm and leg are raised simultaneously like a natural kicking motion, a brown American football with white laces already launched and flying away upward and to the right with the pointed tip leading the way, the football must look like a real brown leather American football with visible white lace stitching not a glowing orb, electric pink and purple and yellow lightning energy trailing from the kicker's foot only, cracked stone platform beneath, full body visible from head to toe, neutral eye level viewing angle

chaos_archetypes.name: The Special Teams First Ballot

chaos_archetypes.name: The Retirement Watch

meta.numbering_note: IDs 1-360 are standard archetypes, 361-389 are chaos tier archetypes
